Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator extends Object implements Serializable
Black-box evaluator for large multi-area ProcessModel optimization problems.

This evaluator fills the gap between the single-flowsheet ProcessSimulationEvaluator and integrated models composed of several named ProcessSystem areas. Decision variables are addressed with the existing ProcessAutomation syntax, for example "Wells::Producer A.flowRate". This keeps external optimizers independent of the internal Java object graph while still allowing objective and constraint functions to inspect the full model.

The intended use case is fixed-equipment throughput optimization: vary producer/feed rates, run the full ProcessModel, and stop when installed capacity constraints reveal the active bottleneck. Capacity constraints can be added explicitly to equipment or discovered through the EquipmentCapacityStrategyRegistry.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team
See Also:

    • addParameter

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator addParameter(String address, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit)
      Adds an automation-addressed decision variable.
      Parameters:
      address - area-qualified automation address
      lowerBound - lower optimization bound
      upperBound - upper optimization bound
      unit - unit used when setting the variable
      Returns:
      this evaluator for chaining

    • addParameter

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator addParameter(String name, String address, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit)
      Adds an automation-addressed decision variable with an explicit display name.
      Parameters:
      name - human readable parameter name
      address - area-qualified automation address
      lowerBound - lower optimization bound
      upperBound - upper optimization bound
      unit - unit used when setting the variable
      Returns:
      this evaluator for chaining

    • addParameterWithSetter

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator addParameterWithSetter(String name, BiConsumer<ProcessModel,Double> setter, double lowerBound, double upperBound, String unit)
      Adds a decision variable controlled by a custom setter.
      Parameters:
      name - human readable parameter name
      setter - custom setter receiving the model and the bounded value
      lowerBound - lower optimization bound
      upperBound - upper optimization bound
      unit - unit used for reporting the parameter
      Returns:
      this evaluator for chaining

      Adds an equality constraint.
      Parameters:
      name - constraint name
      evaluator - model-level constraint evaluator
      target - target value
      tolerance - allowed absolute deviation from target

      this evaluator for chaining

    • getConstraints

      public List<ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.ConstraintDefinition> getConstraints()
      Gets all constraints.
      Returns:
      constraint definitions

    • getConstraintCount

      public int getConstraintCount()
      Gets the number of constraints.
      Returns:
      constraint count

    • addEquipmentCapacityConstraints

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator addEquipmentCapacityConstraints()
      Adds installed equipment capacity constraints from all process areas.

      Each enabled equipment capacity constraint becomes an upper-bound constraint where utilization must be less than or equal to 1.0. Constraint names are area-qualified as "area::equipment/constraint" so bottlenecks can be traced back to the full model.

      Returns:
      this evaluator for chaining

    • getAllCapacityConstraints

      private Map<String,CapacityConstraint> getAllCapacityConstraints(EquipmentCapacityStrategyRegistry registry, ProcessEquipmentInterface equipment)
      Gets explicit and strategy-generated capacity constraints for equipment.
      Parameters:
      registry - capacity strategy registry
      equipment - equipment to inspect
      Returns:
      merged constraint map with explicit equipment constraints taking precedence

    • addCapacityConstraint

      private void addCapacityConstraint(String areaName, String equipmentName, String equipmentConstraintName, CapacityConstraint capacityConstraint)
      Adds a single capacity constraint definition.
      Parameters:
      areaName - process area name
      equipmentName - equipment name
      equipmentConstraintName - equipment constraint name
      capacityConstraint - capacity constraint

    • hasConstraint

      private boolean hasConstraint(String constraintName)
      Checks whether a constraint with the specified name already exists.
      Parameters:
      constraintName - constraint name
      Returns:
      true when an existing constraint has the same name

    • getBounds

      public double[][] getBounds()
      Gets optimization bounds as a matrix.
      Returns:
      matrix with lower and upper bound for each parameter

    • getBoundsAsList

      public List<double[]> getBoundsAsList()
      Gets optimization bounds as a list for Python callers.
      Returns:
      list of two-element arrays with lower and upper bounds

      public double[] getLowerBounds()
      Gets lower bounds.
      Returns:
      lower bound vector

      upper bound vector

      public double[] getInitialValues()
      Gets initial parameter values.
      Returns:
      initial parameter vector

    • evaluate

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.EvaluationResult evaluate(double[] parameterValues)
      Evaluates the process model at the supplied parameter values.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector with length equal to getParameterCount()
      Returns:
      complete evaluation result

    • setParameterValues

      private void setParameterValues(ProcessModel model, double[] parameterValues)
      Sets bounded parameter values on the model.
      Parameters:
      model - process model
      parameterValues - parameter values

    • findActiveBottleneck

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.BottleneckStatus findActiveBottleneck(ProcessModel model)
      Finds the active bottleneck across all process areas.
      Parameters:
      model - process model in its current state
      Returns:
      active bottleneck status, or ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.BottleneckStatus.none() when no constraint exists

    • getConstraintMarginVector

      public double[] getConstraintMarginVector(ProcessModel model)
      Evaluates all constraints and returns the margin vector for external solvers.
      Parameters:
      model - process model in its current state
      Returns:
      constraint margins in registration order

    • evaluateObjective

      public double evaluateObjective(double[] parameterValues)
      Evaluates only the primary objective.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector
      Returns:
      primary objective value using minimizer sign convention

    • evaluatePenalizedObjective

      public double evaluatePenalizedObjective(double[] parameterValues)
      Evaluates the primary objective plus constraint penalties.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector
      Returns:
      penalized objective value

    • isFeasible

      public boolean isFeasible(double[] parameterValues)
      Checks feasibility at a parameter point.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector
      Returns:
      true when the model converges and hard constraints are satisfied

    • estimateGradient

      public double[] estimateGradient(double[] parameterValues)
      Estimates the primary objective gradient by finite differences.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector
      Returns:
      gradient vector

    • estimateGradient

      public double[] estimateGradient(double[] parameterValues, int objectiveIndex)
      Estimates an objective gradient by finite differences.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector
      objectiveIndex - objective index
      Returns:
      gradient vector

    • estimateConstraintJacobian

      public double[][] estimateConstraintJacobian(double[] parameterValues)
      Estimates the constraint Jacobian by finite differences.
      Parameters:
      parameterValues - parameter vector
      Returns:
      matrix with constraints as rows and parameters as columns

    • getFiniteDifferenceStep

      public double getFiniteDifferenceStep()
      Gets the finite-difference step.
      Returns:
      finite-difference step

    • setFiniteDifferenceStep

      public void setFiniteDifferenceStep(double finiteDifferenceStep)
      Sets the finite-difference step.
      Parameters:
      finiteDifferenceStep - finite-difference step

    • isUseRelativeStep

      public boolean isUseRelativeStep()
      Checks whether relative finite-difference steps are used.
      Returns:
      true when finite-difference steps are relative

    • setUseRelativeStep

      public void setUseRelativeStep(boolean useRelativeStep)
      Sets whether finite-difference steps are relative.
      Parameters:
      useRelativeStep - true to scale finite-difference steps by parameter magnitude

    • isIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints

      public boolean isIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints()
      Checks whether strategy-generated equipment capacity constraints are included.
      Returns:
      true when strategy-generated constraints are included with direct equipment constraints

    • setIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints

      public void setIncludeStrategyCapacityConstraints(boolean includeStrategyCapacityConstraints)
      Sets whether strategy-generated equipment capacity constraints are included.

      Direct constraints attached to equipment are always included. Disable this option for installed capacity studies where only explicit fixed-equipment limits from design data should determine feasibility and active bottleneck reporting.

      Parameters:
      includeStrategyCapacityConstraints - true to include strategy-generated constraints

    • getEvaluationCount

      public int getEvaluationCount()
      Gets the evaluation count.
      Returns:
      number of evaluation attempts

    • getLastResult

      public ProcessModelSimulationEvaluator.EvaluationResult getLastResult()
      Gets the last evaluation result.
      Returns:
      last evaluation result, or null before the first evaluation

    • getLastParameters

      public double[] getLastParameters()
      Gets the last evaluated parameter vector.
      Returns:
      last parameter vector, or null before the first evaluation

    • getProblemDefinition

      public Map<String,Object> getProblemDefinition()
      Gets a JSON-friendly problem definition.
      Returns:
      map containing parameters, objectives, constraints, and model areas

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the problem definition as JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON problem definition

    • ensureProcessModel

      private void ensureProcessModel()
      Ensures a process model has been configured.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - when no process model has been set
